chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Rev. A. No. 25 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 16.10.2023 For orders on MA 11044/23 Mr. Muhammad Jameel Khan, Advocate for applicant Through this Cr. Revision Application, applicant Furqan Ali has challenged the order dated 25.02.2020 passed by learned IInd Additional Sessions Judge, Hyderabad on an application under Section 265-K Cr.P.C. moved in Special Case No. 01 of 2019 emanated from Crime No. 03 of 2019 registered by FIA Crime Circle Hyderabad under Sections 4 & 5 r/w 23 FER Act 1947 & 48-G PPC; whereby the learned Judge dismissed the said application inter alia on the ground that there is sufficient evidence on record to show the guilt of accused and at this stage it cannot be said that there is no probability of accused being convicted for exercising the powers under Section 265-K Cr.P.C. Learned counsel states at the bar that he does not press this Cr. Rev. Application and submits that the trial court may be directed to procure the attendance of all the prosecution witnesses positively as they are reluctant to appear. In view of such statement, this Cr. Rev. Application along with pending applications is disposed of with direction to the trial court to procure the attendance of all the prosecution witnesses and dispose of the case within reasonable time. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
